title: IbisNode
description: A node in the IBIS (Issue-Based Information System) argumentation graph. Structural entity — first-class, ratified §5.3 (CLAUDE.md §5). Kind enum is the intra-entity gate; parent-typing rules (P12) are cross-entity Python invariants (Layer 1c). P13 (position pluralism ≥2 per issue) is a soft Python warning. Weasel-verb neutrality lint on 'position' text is PI-tunable intra-entity: PI to finalise banned-verb regex before Layer 1c.

kind.description: IBIS node type. Parent-typing invariant P12 requires: position → parent is issue; argument_pro/argument_con → parent is position; issue → parent is issue or absent (root). Enforced by Python (Layer 1c).

text.description: Content of this IBIS node. For 'position' kind, must not contain banned weasel verbs (intra-entity lint — PI to finalise regex pattern before Layer 1c).

parent_id.description: ID of the parent IbisNode. Absent for root issues. Materialises to E_parent. Parent-typing (P12) enforced in Python.

supports_id.description: For kind=argument_pro: ID of the Position this argument supports. Materialises to E_supports.

contradicts_id.description: For kind=argument_con: ID of the Position this argument contradicts. Materialises to E_contradicts.

problem_context.description: Optional Problem ID this IBIS subgraph is anchored to. Enables per-Problem IBIS subgraph queries.

claim_ids.description: Claims that substantiate this IBIS node (optional). Materialises to E_evidenced_by.
